title: Ethical Gift Cards

narrative: The user seeks gift card options that align with ethical, ecological, and solidarity values—preferably French-made digital cards valid at local sustainable businesses. Relevance is determined by cards explicitly labeled as ethical, ecological, or solidarity-based (e.g., Ethi'Kdo), supporting responsible consumption, with no palm oil, synthetic ingredients, or exploitative practices. Cards tied to generic retailers, gaming, travel, or financial apps (e.g., Amazon, CashNGifts, MTG) are irrelevant, even if labeled 'gift cards,' as they lack the specified social or environmental mission. The user values transparency, environmental impact, and community support over convenience or brand variety.

title: Lotus E85 Performance

Documents that mention E85 conversion challenges (e.g., injector degradation, fuel tank corrosion) or comparisons with SP98 gasoline are highly relevant. Documents discussing Lotus hybrids, classic models without E85 modifications, or unrelated car brands are not relevant.

title: Employment Bonuses
description: What government incentives are available in France to encourage unemployed individuals, particularly long-term jobseekers and those over 50, to re-enter the workforce through training or hiring?
